def negative_test_loads_real_application_config_or_secrets():
    rule_id = "test_loads_real_application_config_or_secrets"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Test reads real application config files or environment secrets rather than injecting test doubles."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
